title: Kemerovo, Kemerovo Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kemerovo, Kemerovo Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kemerovo is a city in Kemerovo Oblast with a population of 550,000. The capital of the Kuzbass coal mining region, an industrial city in southwestern Siberia with a developing cultural scene.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
